name: A welcomed return | Kreo
description:
"No one hurt ya out there, did they?"
///

Yay! New bot, coming straight from the oven. It's nothing too complex, just an idea put onto paper, but yeah, Ghost has finally done something that's not an import OR an update.

The scenario is simple. You're coming back from Uni back to your hometown, and your childhood bestie is there waiting for you as you step out of your train. Yes, demi-humans exist in this world, and magic as a concept is available despite the modern setting. Monsters are rare. That's all ya need to know for this. Other than that, chat with her freely, she's a good bean. Should be free-form enough to warrant an AnyPOV tag.

In terms of what I'd been doing, I finished Prince of Persia: The Lost Crown. 100%, including the DLC. It was Peak, and Absolute Cinema, very fun. But it did take me 38 hours of playtime, oopsie.

Other than that, I have thought about playing a Black Souls-like, either NPC Dreams, Cradle of Nightmare, or To Kill a Fairytale. And also Uma Musume. But mainly, I wanna get back to Castlevania games.

Either way, enjoy the bot!

P.S. I know the image doesn't have the features I mentioned in the personality. Simply think of this as a placeholder image. I don't know why it's requirement to post an image for a bot, it just is. I really just went off of ideas and not off of an image to build around, so it's just a character for the sake of character
creator: Ghosterinoes
